recommendations.title: King of Killers
recommendations.overview: Garan is a part of a group of international hitmen who are contracted to take out the most dangerous killer in the world, only to find out that they're the ones being hunted.

recommendations.title: One for the Money
recommendations.overview: An unemployed lingerie buyer convinces her bail bondsman cousin to give her a shot as a bounty hunter. Her first assignment is to track down a former cop on the run for murder – the same man who broke her heart years before. With the help of some fri

recommendations.title: Domino
recommendations.overview: The story of the life of Domino Harvey, who abandoned her career as a Ford model to become a bounty hunter.

recommendations.title: Midnight Run
recommendations.overview: A bounty hunter pursues a former Mafia accountant who is also being chased by a rival bounty hunter, the F.B.I., and his old mob boss after jumping bail.

recommendations.title: Restraint
recommendations.overview: Two fugitives land in hot water when they take a hostage who poses a threat to their well-being.

recommendations.title: Perrier's Bounty
recommendations.overview: A gangster named Perrier looks to exact his revenge on a trio of fugitives responsible for the accidental death of one of his cronies.

recommendations.title: Trigun: Badlands Rumble
recommendations.overview: In a quicksand surrounded town called Makka, rumors spread of a legendary robber named Gasback is after the town. To protect it, Mayor Kepler has hired bounty hunters. These hunters have been following Gasback from town to town in hopes of getting th

recommendations.title: Wreck-It Ralph
recommendations.overview: Wreck-It Ralph is the 9-foot-tall, 643-pound villain of an arcade video game named Fix-It Felix Jr., in which the game's titular hero fixes buildings that Ralph destroys. Wanting to prove he can be a good guy and not just a villain, Ralph escapes his

recommendations.title: Cold Prey III
recommendations.overview: In 1988, a group of teenagers go to visit an abandoned hotel, only to find themselves hunted by a psychotic killer through the Norwegian woods.

recommendations.title: Rowdy Rathore
recommendations.overview: A small-time thug comes across a young girl who claims him to be her father, following which he realizes he has a lookalike who's being hunted by goons.
